query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.openId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
       dp.id as profileId, dp.driver_code as driverCode, dp.name as driverName, dp.status
FROM users u
JOIN driver_profiles dp ON dp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.openId = 'demo-driver-autohaul';
